The closing couplet (maqta) of Diwan-e-Ghalib chapter 239 (work slug: mirza-ghalib-diwan-e-ghalib-74ed4c) is:

"From the unseen, these thoughts into my mind are thrown:
O Ghalib, for my scratching pen makes known
An angel's voice, in its own sacred tone."
